prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic 3D creator workspace poster using my uploaded image as a STRICT facial reference with absolute identity preservation. Style: Premium cozy Pinterest-style 3D illustration mixed with cinematic AI creator branding aesthetics. Soft warm beige, blush pink, cream, mocha, dusty rose, and golden lighting dominate the palette. The image should feel elegant, emotionally warm, intelligent, feminine, artistic, and inspiring. Focus.”, “Romanticizing my life & building my empire”, “Creating magic with AI”, “Plans. Ideas. Content. Impact.” Character Styling: oversized cream cardigan, soft pleated blush skirt, minimal elegant jewelry, soft makeup, relaxed artistic fashion, warm confident expression, cinematic glow on skin. Environment Mood: The room should feel like: AI creator studio, feminine productivity sanctuary, Pinterest workspace, cinematic storytelling office, cozy artistic startup brand identity. Add floating social media icons, hearts, stars, clouds, creative doodles, mini widgets, cinematic glow particles, and aesthetic interface panels around the composition. Rendering: ultra high-detail 3D illustration, semi-realistic face, soft global illumination, luxury pastel textures, cinematic depth of field, polished matte materials, warm emotional lighting, highly aesthetic social-media-ready composition, premium brand-poster quality
